inputs.label: PIN Length
inputs.businessContext: Number of digits in the generated PIN

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of digits in the generated PIN

inputs.label: Seed Number
inputs.businessContext: Unique numeric seed for PIN derivation

businessContext_i18n.en: Unique numeric seed for PIN derivation
businessContext_i18n.tr: PIN türetimi için benzersiz sayısal tohum
businessContext_i18n.de: Eindeutiger numerischer Seed für die PIN-Ableitung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de départ unique pour la dérivation du code PIN

inputs.label: Shift Factor
inputs.businessContext: Offset to create different PINs from same seed

businessContext_i18n.en: Offset to create different PINs from same seed
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aynı tohumdan farklı PIN'ler oluşturmak için ofset
businessContext_i18n.de: Offset zur Erzeugung unterschiedlicher PINs aus demselben Seed
businessContext_i18n.fr: Décalage pour créer différents codes PIN à partir du même nombre de départ
businessContext_i18n.es: Desplazamiento para crear diferentes PINs a partir de la misma semilla

breakdown: Calculate absolute sine of (seed * multiplier + shiftFactor)
Modulo 10^pinLength to constrain to desired digit range
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
